category_sources: source_facts.description says imposm3 imports OpenStreetMap data into PostgreSQL/PostGIS; official docs at https://imposm.org/docs/imposm3/latest/ describe Imposm3.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is imposm3; official documentation title uses Imposm3.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Imposm3 documentation URL; official docs page also links the source code repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names OpenStreetMap, PostgreSQL, and PostGIS; source_facts.executables lists the imposm CLI.
